## Part I: Introduction

-   [**Chapter 1**: Introduction](https://yyliou.github.io/da/ch1/ch1.html)

-   [**Chapter 2**: First Steps](https://yyliou.github.io/da/ch2/ch2.html)

## Part II: Layers

-   [**Chapter 3**: Individual geoms](https://yyliou.github.io/da/ch3/ch3.html)

-   [**Chapter 4**: Collective geoms geoms](https://yyliou.github.io/da/ch4/ch4.html)

-   [**Chapter 5**: Statistical summaries geoms](https://yyliou.github.io/da/ch5/ch5.html)

-   [**Chapter 6**: Maps](https://yyliou.github.io/da/ch6/ch6.html)

-   [**Chapter 7**: Networks](https://yyliou.github.io/da/ch7/ch7.html)

-   [**Chapter 8**: Annotations](https://yyliou.github.io/da/ch8/ch8.html)

-   [**Chapter 9**: Arranging plots](https://yyliou.github.io/da/ch9/ch9.html)

## Part III: Scales

-   [**Chapter 10**: Position scales and axes](https://yyliou.github.io/da/ch10/ch10.html)

-   [**Chapter 11**: Colour scales and legends](https://yyliou.github.io/da/ch11/ch11.html)

-   [**Chapter 12**: Other aesthetics](https://yyliou.github.io/da/ch12/ch12.html)

## Part IV: The Grammar
